content.thinking:
Perfect! Now I can see the actual issue. The git commit is failing because there's "nothing to commit, working tree clean". This means the OpenRewrite recipe `org.openrewrite.java.format.AutoFormat` didn't make any changes to the files, probably because there are no Java files in the repository or the files are already properly formatted.

The error handling should have caught this case with the "nothing to commit" check, but it's not working because the stdout says "nothing to commit, working tree clean" but my check is only looking at stderr. Let me fix this:
